sessions.summary: Audited C4C V3 connector DRAFT help docs page-by-page for V2/ODM contamination. Prepared comment set for Ola: delete stale Relationship EVENT page (schema stays), fix event count 12->11, add 3 Update actions to landing table, rewrite ODM default-mapping Note, Registered-Product Profile anchor, Org-page pasted-note + wrong-URL, Update-Account addresses/isMain, B2B default-scope note. Verified all anchor claims against the connector default mappings; confirmed reporter.id=contact with Irena. Learned SAP Help SPA silently redirects bad slugs.
